ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device category */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broader device category */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the device category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the device category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "device_parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device parameter */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the version change */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version has been approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality control specialist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manufacturer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manufacturer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter relationship */,
  "parameter_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first parameter in the relationship */,
  "parameter_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second parameter in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., impact, dependency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_relationships_parameter_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id_2") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_relationships_parameter_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id_1") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the scenario was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "device_parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device parameter */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_results_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)
